mapper.select: SELECT ba.batch_id as batchId, ba.preferential_type as preferentialType, ba.free_rent_periods as freeRentPeriods FROM hz_batch_house bh INNER JOIN hz_batch_allocation ba ON bh.batch_id = ba.batch_id WHERE bh.house_id = #{houseId} AND bh.del_flag = '0' AND ba.del_flag = '0' AND ba.approve_status = '1' LIMIT 1
